title: MACHINE-LEARNING MODELS FOR IMAGE PROCESSING
summary: Presented herein are systems and methods for the employment of machine learning models for image processing as may be performed by computing devices associated with an end user. A method may include obtaining video data comprising a plurality of frames including a document of a document type. The method may include executing an object recognition engine of a machine-learning architecture using image data of the plurality of frames, the object recognition engine trained to detect edges of documents. The method may include identifying, based on the edge detection, a plurality of boundaries for the document. The method may include validating, based on the plurality of boundaries, the document as the document type. The method may include transmitting via one or more networks, to a computer remote from the computing device, responsive to the validation of the type of document, the image data for the plurality of frames depicting the document.
details:
AMENDMENTS TO THE CLAIMS:
This listing of claims will replace all prior versions and listings of claims in the application:
Listing of Claims:
1
1. (Currently Amended) A method for client-side validation of document-imagery for remote processing, the method comprising:obtaining, by a camera of a mobile client device associated with an end-user, video data comprising a plurality of frames having image data including a document and an operation request associated with the image data received via a user interface of the mobile client device;
extracting, by the mobile client device executing an object recognition engine, a set of document features from the image data containing the document;
generating, by the mobile client device executing the object recognition engine, a user validation score based upon the set of document features extracted for the document, wherein the object recognition engine includes a machine-learning architecture trained to identify a registered user using the set of document features and corresponding training labels indicating the registered user having an expected set of document features, the user validation score indicating a likelihood that the end-user is the registered user based upon a similarity between the set of document features extracted for the document and the expected set of document features for the registered user; and

[[upon]] in response to validating the end-user as the registered user based on determining that the user validation score satisfies a user validation threshold[[,]]:
generating, by the mobile client device, a packaged image extracted from the image data of at least one frame of the plurality of frames of the video data captured by the mobile client device; and
generating, by the mobile client device, an operation instruction for a backend server, the operation instruction including the packaged image and device metadata identifying the mobile client device; or
 in response to non-validation of the end-user as the registered user based on determining that the user validation score does not satisfy the user validation threshold:

g
enerating
, by the mobile client device, a notification comprising an indication of the non-validation.
Currently amended

2
2. (Original) The method of claim 1, 
wherein obtaining the operation request includes receiving, by the mobile client device, via the user interface of the mobile client device the operation request indicating at least one operation to be performed in accordance with the document in the image data.
Original

3
3. (Currently Amended) The method of claim 1, 
further comprising, in response to validating the end-user as the registered user, transmitting, by the mobile client device, the image data of the document and the device metadata from a mobile wallet, to the backend server via one or more networks.
Currently amended

4
4. (Original) The method of claim 1, 
further comprising executing, by the mobile client device, one or more remedial operations for the operation request, in response to determining that the user validation score fails to satisfy the user validation threshold.
Original

5
5. (Original) The method of claim 4, 
wherein a remedial operation of the one or more remedial operations includes at least one of:
generating a prompt for additional authenticating data of the end-user for display at the user interface, halting the operation request, or halting an application executed at the mobile client device.

Original

6
6. (Original) The method of claim 1, 
wherein obtaining the image data includes parsing, by the mobile client device, pixel data at a portion of the image data containing the portion of the document, andwherein the mobile client device extracts the set of document features of the document using the portion of the pixel data, and generates the user validation score based upon the set of document features extracted for the portion of the document.

Original

7
7. (Original) The method of claim 1, 
wherein obtaining the image data includes receiving,
by the mobile client device, a video feed from the camera comprising the plurality of frames containing the image data containing the document.
Original

8
8. (Original) The method of claim 1, 
wherein obtaining the image data includes receiving,
by the mobile client device, the video data comprising the plurality of frames having the image data from the camera of the mobile client device.
Original

9
9. (Original) The method of claim 1, 
wherein the mobile client device trains the object recognition engine for detecting the set of document features of the document based upon a training dataset comprising a plurality of training document images corresponding to the training labels, at least one training label indicating a document type of the document.
Original

10
10. (Original) The method of claim 1, 
wherein the mobile client device trains the object recognition engine for generating the user validation score based upon a training dataset comprising a plurality of prior document images associated with the registered user corresponding to the training labels, at least training label indicating at least one of a user identifier associated with the registered user and a corresponding prior document image or the set of document features of the corresponding prior document image.
Original

11
11. (Currently Amended) A system for client-side validation of document-imagery for remote processing, the system comprising:a mobile client device associated with an end-user comprising at least one processor and a camera, configured to:
obtain, by the camera, video data comprising a plurality of frames having image data including a document and an operation request associated with the image data received via a user interface of the mobile client device;

extract, executing an object recognition engine, a set of document features from the image data containing the document;
generate, executing the object recognition engine, a user validation score based upon the set of document features extracted for the document, wherein the object recognition engine includes a machine-learning architecture trained to identify a registered user using the set of document features and corresponding training labels indicating the registered user having an expected set of document features, the user validation score indicating a likelihood that the end- user is the registered user based upon a similarity between the set of document features extracted for the document and the expected set of document features for the registered user;
[[upon]] in response to the mobile client device validating the end-user as the registered user based on determining that the user validation score satisfies a user validation threshold,generate a packaged image extracted from the image data of at least one frame of the plurality of frames of the video data captured by the mobile client device; and generate an operation instruction for a backend server, the operation instruction including the packaged image and device mobile metadata identifying the mobile client device;
 or
 in response to non-validation of the end-user as the registered user based on determining that the user validation score does not satisfy the user validation threshold, generate a notification comprising an indication of the non-validation.

Currently amended

12
12. (Original) The system of claim 11, 
wherein when obtaining the operation request the mobile client device is configured to receive via the user interface of the mobile client device the operation request indicating at least one operation to be performed in accordance with the document in the image data.
Original

wherein the mobile client device is configured to, in response to validating the end-user as the registered user, transmit the image

data of the document and the device metadata from a mobile wallet, to the backend server via one or more networks.

wherein the mobile client device is configured to execute one or more remedial operations for the operation request, in response to determining that the user validation score fails to satisfy the user validation threshold.
Original

wherein a remedial operation of the one or more remedial operations includes at least one of:
generating a prompt for additional authenticating data of the end-user for display at the user interface, halting the operation request, or halting an application executed at the mobile client device.

Original

Original

wherein when obtaining the image data includes the mobile client device is configured to receive a video feed from the camera comprising the plurality of frames containing the image data containing the document.
Original

18. (Original) The system of claim 11, 
wherein when obtaining the image data includes the mobile client device is configured to receive the video data comprising the plurality of frames having the image data from the camera of the mobile client device.

Original

19. (Original) The system of claim 11, 
wherein the mobile client device is configured to train the object recognition engine for detecting the set of document features of the document based upon a training dataset comprising a plurality of training document images corresponding to the training labels, at least one training label indicating a document type of the document.
Original

wherein the mobile client device is configured to train the object recognition engine for generating the user validation score based upon a training dataset comprising a plurality of prior document images associated with the registered user corresponding to the training labels, at least training label indicating at least one of a user identifier associated with the registered user and a corresponding prior document image or the set of document features of the corresponding prior document image.
